sections.title: Attempting to enter the Alchemical Society for the first time

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: Hey! Where do you think you're going?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanted to see what was down these stairs.

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: We are the Alchemical Society and those stairs lead to our lab and production facilities.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I think its best that I stay away then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm actually quite skilled in Herblore. Would it be possible for me to join?

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: You are? Well, we're always looking for new members, provided they have the aptitude needed. In that case, head on in and talk to Supervisor Lalo. He'll show you how everything works.

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: Welcome to the Alchemical Society. What can I help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: This is the main facility of the Alchemical Society. We're an organisation who fuse the forgotten teachings of the Old Ones with traditional Gielinorian Herblore practices.

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: The lab under our feet allows us to fund our research by producing useful products for the kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you do things differently to the druids of the mainland?

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: In a way, but we very much respect Herblore as a profession and recognise that whatever your druids do definitely works. Our goal is to advance the study of Herblore, not replace it.

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: Anyway, I'm a little busy at the moment, but I'm sure some of the other lab assistants would love to tell you more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: When I'm not working in the lab, I'm normally somewhere around here researching or administrating our orders. There's an awful lot of paperwork to get through!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy some potions?

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: We're not really a shop, so our products are not available to buy directly. Everything we make gets shipped wholesale around the kingdom.

lines.speaker: Clanila
lines.text: You look like the adventuring type anyway. I can't imagine our products would be of much use to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing. I'll be going now.
